emailAccounts.title: Email accounts
emailAccounts.subtitle: Connect the inboxes you want to send outreach from.
emailAccounts.emptyDesc: Connect your first email account to start sending outreach.
emailAccounts.dialogDesc: Sign in with Google or use SMTP / IMAP.
emailAccounts.oauthSoon: Recommended: Outlook or your own domain
emailAccounts.oauthSoonDesc: Outlook/Microsoft 365 connects in one click (OAuth) — safest and easiest. Have Gmail or your own domain? Connect with an app password or SMTP/IMAP.
emailAccounts.reconnectHint: Your connection has expired or been revoked. Click to sign in again.
emailAccounts.pausedBounceTitle: Account auto-paused — bounce rate too high
emailAccounts.pausedBounceDesc: We've paused sending from this account to protect your sender reputation. Clean up your lead list and reactivate when you're ready.
emailAccounts.deliverabilityWarnMissing: missing for your domain. Fix them before your next large campaign or you risk landing in spam.

providerPicker.title: Connect email account
providerPicker.subtitle: Pick your email provider below. We'll walk you through connecting it securely.
providerPicker.microsoftDesc: Sign in with Microsoft — no configuration.
providerPicker.microsoftNote: The first time you connect, Microsoft shows a consent screen asking you to allow sending and reading email on your behalf. Tokens are stored encrypted and can be revoked at any time.
providerPicker.googleDesc: One-click sign-in with Google coming soon.
providerPicker.customDesc: Manual SMTP & IMAP — for cPanel, Postfix, Exchange and more.

providerGuide.title: Connect {{provider}}
providerGuide.subtitle: Secure app-password method. No recurring re-auth. {{time}}.
providerGuide.appPasswordHint: Paste the app password from {{provider}}. Spaces are stripped automatically.

custom.hostHint: Usually mail.yourdomain.com or smtp.yourdomain.com. Ask your hosting provider if unsure.
custom.imapHostHint: Usually the same as SMTP but with an imap. prefix.
custom.sameAsSmtpToggle: Use the same settings for IMAP
custom.noImapWarning: IMAP is required. Without it we cannot detect when a lead replies, which would let follow-ups keep going after a reply. Fill in IMAP values or enable "Use the same settings".
custom.detectedProvider: This looks like a {{provider}} account. Want to use the guide instead?

success.title: Email account connected
success.subtitle: All set. You can now use {{email}} for outreach.

landing.badge: AI-powered outbound that actually gets replies
landing.heroSub: Generate personalized cold emails and follow-ups for every lead in seconds. No templates. No research. Just hit send.
landing.noCard: No credit card required · Free forever up to 10 leads
landing.howTitle: From lead list to booked meeting in 3 steps
landing.howSub: No complex setup. No learning curve. Just results.
landing.step1Desc: Paste or type your leads with their company, role, and any context you have.
landing.step2Desc: AI writes a unique cold email + two follow-ups tailored to each lead.
landing.step3Desc: Copy the emails, paste into your outreach tool, and start booking meetings.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to scale outbound
landing.featuresSub: From lead import to personalized sequences — one workflow, zero busywork.
landing.f1Desc: Generate unique emails for every lead based on their company, role, and background — no templates needed.
landing.f2Desc: Outreach that's actually relevant gets opened, read, and replied to.
landing.f3Desc: Stop researching and writing manually. MailLead.ai does the heavy lifting so you can focus on closing.
landing.f4Desc: Manage campaigns, leads, and sequences in one place — whether you're a founder or a 50-person sales team.
landing.f5Desc: See all your campaigns and generated outreach from a single dashboard.
landing.f6Desc: Get a cold email plus two follow-ups generated for every single lead.
landing.quote1: We used to spend 3 hours writing emails for 10 leads. MailLead.ai does it in under a minute — and the reply rates are actually better.
landing.quote2: Our team booked 40% more meetings in the first month. The personalization is so good, prospects think we spent hours on each email.
landing.ctaTitle: Your competitors are already personalizing. Are you?
landing.ctaSub: Join hundreds of teams already using MailLead.ai to book more meetings.
landing.mobileCta: Try free — no credit card needed

pricing.title: Simple pricing. You only pay for leads you actually want to reach.
pricing.subtitle: Start free with 25 credits. Top up or pick a plan when you scale.
pricing.earlyAccessNote: We're opening paid plans in waves. Email us and we'll activate your plan within 24h.

free.name: Free
free.desc: Try the full engine — no credit card.

starter.name: Starter
starter.desc: For the solo founder building a first pipeline.

growth.name: Growth
growth.desc: For sales teams serious about outbound.

scale.name: Scale
scale.desc: For agencies and teams with multiple senders.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.desc: Custom volume, SSO, DPA and dedicated CSM.

creditUsage.title: What a credit costs
creditUsage.subtitle: 1 credit = 1 verified email. AI writing, sequences and sending are always included.

rows.action: AI builds a full campaign/sequence for you
Deep ICP research per lead (coming soon)

topups.title: Need more? Top up credits anytime.
topups.subtitle: Top-up credits are valid for 12 months and consumed after plan credits. Plans always have a better per-credit price.

faqs.a: One credit equals one verified B2B email. AI writing, campaign building and sending are always included — you only pay for the data we fetch for you.

faqs.q: What happens if I don't use all my credits in a month?
faqs.a: Plan credits roll over for 60 days. Top-up credits are valid for 12 months and are always consumed after plan credits.

faqs.q: Can I top up credits without upgrading my plan?
faqs.a: Yes. You can buy credit packs even on the Free plan. Plans always have a better per-credit price, but top-ups are flexible.

faqs.q: Do AI emails or campaign building cost extra?
faqs.a: No. Unlimited AI writing, regeneration, sequences and campaign building are included in all plans — even Free. We only charge for data.
Yes — cancel in Settings, no questions asked. On a yearly plan you keep access until the end of the period.

faqs.q: How does the money-back guarantee work?
faqs.a: If you're not satisfied within 30 days, we refund — no questions asked. Unused credits are refunded per credit.

faqs.q: Do you store my lead data?
faqs.a: Yes, your leads are stored securely in the EU. We never share or sell your data and you can delete anytime.

verify.sub: We've sent a confirmation email to
verify.instructions: Click the link in the email to activate your account.
verify.spamHint: Can't find the email? Check your spam folder.

auth.testimonial: "MailLead.ai cut our outreach prep time by 90%. We booked 12 meetings in our first week."

dashboard.title: Your campaigns
dashboard.subtitle: Manage and track your outreach campaigns
dashboard.upgradeUsed: You've used your free campaign. Upgrade to create unlimited campaigns and scale your outreach.

dashboard.sequencesEmptyDesc: Build a multi-step email sequence and send it from your connected inboxes.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Summary across all your campaigns
analytics.noCampaignData: No campaign data for this period

leads.title: Add leads
leads.subtitle: Manually add leads or upload a CSV / Excel file with your prospects.
leads.dropFile: Click to upload CSV or Excel
leads.mapColumns: Map your columns to lead fields
leads.empty: No leads yet. Add some manually or upload a file.

builder.title: Build your sequence
builder.subtitle: Write your emails and follow-ups. Use variables to personalize each message per lead.
builder.needBody: Add at least one email with a body before continuing.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Choose when and how often the sequence sends emails.
schedule.pauseOnReplyDesc: Stop further follow-ups for any lead who replies.

sending.title: Sending
sending.subtitle: Pick which inboxes to send from and set per-account daily limits.
sending.recommended: Recommended: 25 emails per account per day for best deliverability.
sending.warning: Sending more than 50 emails per day per account can hurt your deliverability and risk your inbox being flagged.
sending.estimate: With {{leads}} leads across {{accounts}} account(s) at {{limit}}/day, this campaign will take ~{{days}} day(s).
sending.needSender: Select at least one sender account.

createCampaign.title: Create a new campaign
createCampaign.subtitle: Tell MailLead.ai who you want to reach and what you're offering.
createCampaign.limitBanner: You've reached your free limit. Upgrade to keep generating outreach.
createCampaign.name: Campaign name
createCampaign.audiencePh: e.g., B2B SaaS founders, Series A-B, 20-200 employees
createCampaign.limitReached: You've reached your campaign limit. Upgrade to create more.
createCampaign.created: Campaign created! Add leads to continue.

campaign.leadLimit: You've reached your lead limit. Upgrade to add more leads.
campaign.name: Name
campaign.noLeads: No leads yet. Click "Add Lead" or "Import file" to get started.
campaign.leadLimitReached: Lead limit reached. Upgrade to add more.
campaign.outreachLimit: You've reached your free limit. Upgrade to keep generating outreach.

outreach.title: Generated outreach
outreach.subtitle: Review, copy, and refine your email sequences. {{count}} leads.
outreach.selectLead: Select a lead to view their outreach.
outreach.noEmails: No emails generated for this lead yet.
outreach.subject: Subject

import.title: Import leads from file
import.desc: Upload a CSV or Excel file. Required column: <0>email</0>. Optional: name, company, role, website, linkedin, notes.
import.fileTypes: CSV, XLSX, or XLS · max 2 MB
import.noRows: No valid rows found. Make sure your file has an 'email' column.
import.importedPartial: Imported {{imported}} of {{total}} leads. Upgrade to import the rest.

upgrade.subtext: Unlock unlimited campaigns, leads, and AI generations

generic.unknown: Something unexpected happened. Please try again in a moment.
generic.network: Couldn't reach the server. Check your internet connection and try again.
generic.timeout: The request took too long. Please try again.
generic.unauthorized: You're not signed in anymore. Please sign in again.

plan.emailAccountsLimit: Your plan doesn't allow more email accounts. Upgrade to add more.
plan.campaignsLimit: Your plan doesn't allow more campaigns. Upgrade to Starter for unlimited.

auth.emailNotConfirmed: You need to confirm your email before signing in. Check your inbox.
auth.userAlreadyExists: An account with that email already exists. Sign in instead.
auth.weakPassword: Password is too weak. Use at least 8 characters with a mix of types.
auth.leakedPassword: This password has appeared in a known data breach. Please choose a different one.
auth.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.
auth.oauthFailed: Sign-in failed. Try again or use a different method.

smtp.missingFields: Fill in all SMTP fields (host, port, username, password).
smtp.authFailed: Wrong username or app password. Make sure 2-step verification is on and the app password was pasted without spaces.
smtp.connectionRefused: Couldn't reach the mail server. Check host/port — or whether a firewall is blocking the connection.
smtp.hostNotFound: Can't find the server ({{host}}). Check the spelling.
smtp.tlsFailed: TLS/SSL handshake failed. Try port 465 (SSL) or 587 (STARTTLS).
smtp.timeout: The mail server didn't respond in time. Please try again.
smtp.personalOutlookBlocked: Microsoft disabled SMTP for personal Outlook/Hotmail accounts in 2024. Use 'Connect with Microsoft' (OAuth) instead.
smtp.appPasswordRequired: Gmail requires an app password (not your normal password). Generate one at myaccount.google.com/apppasswords.

send.gmailAuthExpired: Gmail token expired. Reconnect the account under Email accounts.
send.outlookAuthExpired: Microsoft token expired. Reconnect the account under Email accounts.
send.rateLimited: The mail provider throttled sending temporarily. We'll pause and retry automatically.
send.quotaExceeded: Daily send cap reached. Try again tomorrow or connect more sender accounts.
send.recipientRefused: The recipient address was rejected by the server. Check that it's correct.

oauth.userDeclined: You cancelled or denied access. Try again and approve the permissions to connect the account.
oauth.adminConsentRequired: Your IT administrator must approve the app for your organization first. Ask an admin to sign in once and grant the permissions — after that anyone can connect.
oauth.microsoftAccountUnsupported: This Microsoft account can't be used. Use your work/school account or a personal Outlook/Hotmail account.
oauth.microsoftMisconfigured: The Microsoft connection isn't configured correctly. Contact support — this is a problem on our side.
oauth.googleDisabled: Gmail via OAuth is temporarily disabled. Use Outlook or connect via app password under "Other provider".

ai.noCredits: Out of AI credits. Top up in Settings → Usage.
ai.rateLimited: AI is busy right now. Try again in a moment.
ai.missingCompany: Finish onboarding first so the AI knows what you sell.
ai.generationFailed: AI couldn't generate content. Try again or rewrite the instruction.

upload.noRows: No rows found in the file.
upload.parseFailed: Couldn't read the file. Make sure it isn't corrupted.

import.invalidEmail: A valid email address is required.
import.duplicate: This lead is already in the campaign.

validation.invalidUrl: Enter a valid URL (starting with https://).
